name: first
prompt: Vertical 9:16 iPhone front-camera selfie. An attractive woman in her mid-20s, polished influencer aesthetic — soft natural makeup, glossy lips, glowing healthy skin. She stands in a bright modern luxury kitchen: white marble countertop, brass fixtures, light oak cabinets, an espresso machine in the background, soft morning sunlight pouring through tall windows behind her. Loose silky hair, oversized cream knit sweater, small gold jewelry. Confident half-smile, direct eye contact with the camera, holding her phone in selfie position. Warm bright bokeh background. iPhone selfie aesthetic — natural skin texture, subtle grain, no studio lighting, no logos, no text, no captions. Casual TikTok lifestyle creator vibe.
